---
title: "Odds and Ends + ChatGPT"
listing:
  contents: chatgpt #This should match the post Directory
  sort: true
  type: default
  image-align: right
  max-description-length: 175
  date-format: medium
  categories: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
#    - "date desc"
#    - "title desc"
---
